metadata.description: Memory and instruction optimizer for Claude Code — diagnose, fix, and prevent behavioral degradation. 19 frustration patterns, session transcript mining, proactive seeding, escalation to hooks, and runtime invariance auditor with stateful trajectory tracking.

plugins.name: pensieve
plugins.description: 8 skills: /audit, /optimize, /diagnose, /debrief, /capture, /seed, /harden (escalate to hooks), /enforce (invariance auditor status). Runtime hooks: stateful PostToolUse/Stop/UserPromptSubmit invariance auditor.
